new_array_size.description: Tasks the new submission would add.
new_array_size.title: New Array Size

current_user_pending_count.description: Existing pending jobs the user has on this cluster/QOS.
current_user_pending_count.title: Current User Pending Count

qos_max_jobs_per_user.description: The QOS's MaxJobsPerUser cap (sacctmgr show qos).
qos_max_jobs_per_user.title: Qos Max Jobs Per User

warn_at_pct.description: Warn when (existing + new) >= warn_at_pct * cap. Default 0.7 — at 70%% the next normal-sized array will likely trip the limit.
warn_at_pct.title: Warn At Pct
